title: Tame alert storms
description: Reduce a flood of pages through grouping, inhibition, and demoting non-actionable alerts.
body: Steps: 1. Capture a recent storm and count alerts per incident. 2. Identify alerts that share a root cause and group them by common labels. 3. Add inhibition so the top-level failure suppresses dependents. 4. Demote non-actionable alerts to dashboards or tickets. 5. Re-evaluate the next incident's notification volume. Rollback point: keep prior routing until the new grouping is validated. Validation: a comparable incident produces a single grouped, actionable notification.
